subcodes.title: Du’a’-i-Salavat-i-Fatimih
subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Verily Thou art the Maker of the heavens and the earth and the Ordainer of both command and creation. Never hath there been any like unto Thee, nor any equal, nor any peer, nor any companion. Glorified art Thou! The most exalted essences of contingent beings can never ascend to the atmosphere of Thy sanctity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله المتعالی المنیع. سبحانک اللهم انک انت فاطر السموات و الارض و جاعل الامر والخلق لم یزل لم یکن لک شبه و لا مثل و لا کفو و لا عدل و لا قرین فسبحانک من ان یرتقی الی جو هواء قدسک اعلی جواهر الممکنات
subcodes.subjects: @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for praise and gratitude
